name: codex-pet-desktop
description: Open-source Codex desktop pet with approvals, usage HUD, and local pet packs
author: Codex Pet Desktop contributors

scripts.build:electron: esbuild src/main/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/main/index.cjs --external:electron && esbuild src/preload/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/preload/index.cjs --external:electron && esbuild src/preload/settings.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/preload/settings.cjs --external:electron && esbuild src/hook/receiver.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/hook/codex-pet-hook.cjs
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && npm run build:electron
scripts.package:dir: npm run build && npm run assets:icons && node scripts/package-app.mjs
scripts.verify:m3-2: npm run package:dir && npm run test:e2e:m3-2
